title: gilia multicaulis subsp. peduncularis
intro: Gilia multicaulis subsp. peduncularis, also known as Pedunculate Gilia, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Polemoniaceae family. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pedunculate Gilia include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to support immune function. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
